message:
bd-37a.11: E2E test for effect system cancellation & structured concurrency

10 tests covering: multiple subscription startup, teardown within
deadline, no thread leaks, subscription span active=false after stop,
WARN log for timeout, effects_executed_total counter separation,
full lifecycle scenario, and structured concurrency verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
